title: Advanced Multi-Channel Realtime Chat App

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Multi-Channel Realtime Chat App

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(0, 50)'>
	<g transform='translate(50, 50)'>
		<g transform='translate(25, 0)'>
			<rect width='75' height='25' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
			<g transform='translate(10, 0)'><text x='5' y='10' font-size='18' fill='#B7D7CD'>Channels</text></g>
			<g transform='translate(70, 0)'><rect x='5' width='10' height='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='15' y='10' font-size='14' fill='#B7D7CD'>1</text></g>
		</g>
		<g transform='translate(120, -10)'>
			<line x1='20' y1='0' x2='20' y2='50' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
			<line x1='70' y1='0' x2='70' y2='50' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
			<rect width='20' height='50' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
			<rect x='70' width='20' height='50' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
		</g>
	</g>
	<g transform='translate(50, 150)'>
		<rect width='300' height='25' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
		<rect x='10' width='100' height='20' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
		<rect x='120' width='100' height='20' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
		<text x='20' y='15' font-size='14' fill='#B7D7CD'>General Chat</text>
		<text x='130' y='15' font-size='14' fill='#B7D7CD'>Private Chat</text>
	</g>
	<g transform='translate(50, 200)'>
		<rect width='200' height='50' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
		<rect x='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C56'/>
		<text x='25' y='25' font-size='12' fill='#B7D7CD'>Username</text>
		<rect x='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C56'/>
		<text x='65' y='25' font-size='12' fill='#B7D7CD'>Message</text>
		<text x='100' y='25' font-size='12' fill='#B7D7CD'>Sent at 12:34</text>
	</g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must have a typing indicator that animates when a user is typing

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Multi-Channel Realtime Chat App

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, channel switching, message sending, and typing indicators.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
